description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a predominantly white upper and a thick sole. The shoe features a unique pattern of black, red, and orange puzzle piece shapes scattered across the midsole and toe area, giving it a bold, urban aesthetic. The word 'ENIGMA' is printed in red on the heel tab, adding a distinctive branding element. The shoe is constructed with visible stitching, padded collar, and a standard lace-up closure with white laces. The outsole appears to be made of rubber, providing durability and grip for urban environments. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, suitable for casual streetwear.
description: A white low-top sneaker with black, red, and orange puzzle piece patterns and 'ENIGMA' branding on the heel. Features a padded collar, white laces, and a thick rubber sole.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the 'ENIGMA' branding on the heel and the puzzle piece pattern wrapping around the midsole.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the swooping side panel, white laces, and the extensive puzzle piece pattern along the sole.
description_view_2: Front angle view focusing on the toe box, white laces, and the puzzle piece pattern concentrated at the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the clean white upper, padded collar, and the puzzle piece pattern extending along the side and sole.
